array.string: cd '/Users/rajatsingh/Downloads/S4 AI Agency/S4 AI LLC/Client Database/Island Boy Kreationz Food Truck & Catering' && /usr/bin/env node scripts/island-boy-gbp.mjs --sync-search-console >> logs/search-console.log 2>&1
